subject: fix(ci): update Node to 22, fix audit vulnerability, update description
body:
- CI Node version: 20 -> 22. Vite 7.3.1 requires ^20.19.0 || >=22.12.0.
  Node 20 in CI may resolve to a version below 20.19.0, breaking the
  build. Node 22 matches local dev environment.
- npm audit fix: resolved high-severity picomatch vulnerability
  (transitive dep of Vite, build-time only, not exploitable at runtime
  but keeps CI clean)
- Updated package.json description to match current project purpose

Tags: ci, deps, security
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: portfolio-site
Semver: patch
